title: Galacticrow Additions
description: A mod that adds building blocks and unique tools for you to use.
body:
This mod adds various blocks and tools with the primary purpose of obtaining items that are just plain annoying to get.

- Adds the Pavement Processer, a tool that places a group of blocks held in your off-hand.
- Adds a new shattering mechanic, use tools on brittle blocks to crack them open for goodies.
- Adds a Transmutation Table which magically changes blocks and items into their variations.
- Adds building blocks both familiar and new.

JEI is recommended, the mod is compatable with the Shattering and Transmutation recipes.
